summary: The diff implements a comprehensive FreshGuard Shark Tank pitch landing page with all major sections. All 9 requirements appear to be addressed: hero section, company info, how it works, features showcase, target market, financials, app demo, animations, and cohesive theming. The implementation is thorough and well-structured. Minor concerns exist around the product image reference in FeaturesShowcase but this is an image asset rather than a functional requirement. The backend/main.mo empty actor is a minor hallucination not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Empty Motoko backend actor (backend/main.mo) was created with no functionality
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states all content and UI must be frontend-only with no backend data persistence required. A backend file was not requested and contradicts the frontend-only constraint.

hallucinated_features.description: InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity hook, and useActor hook with authentication infrastructure
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request lists 'User authentication or accounts' as a non-goal. The diff includes full Internet Identity authentication scaffolding wrapped around the App component.

hallucinated_features.description: React Query (QueryClientProvider, useQuery) infrastructure integrated into the app
hallucinated_features.reason: No data fetching or query management was requested for this frontend-only pitch/demo page. The QueryClientProvider wrapping is unnecessary overhead not specified in the requirements.
